overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a neon-lit cyberpunk city plaza. The player character moves from a covered vendor area across wet paved streets, through crowds of pedestrians in an open plaza with massive holographic advertisements, and ends at a street food stall with green neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered plaza with weapon vendor stall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through covered plaza past weapon vendor stall on the left

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind weapon display table with firearms laid out

entered.detail: table displaying firearms and weapons under blue neon lighting
large rotating cylindrical billboard with advertisements hanging above
massive concrete support pillar with graffiti

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a semi-covered urban plaza at night. A weapon vendor stall occupies the left side with a vendor standing behind a display of firearms. A large circular digital billboard rotates overhead, and the ground consists of wet paved tiles reflecting the ambient neon light.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial underpass with metal grate flooring

events.description: ground surface changes from paved tiles to metal grating with yellow caution stripes

agents.ego_description: walking across metal grate floor in industrial underpass area

entered.detail: industrial metal grating walkway with yellow and black caution stripes

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through an industrial underpass with metal grate flooring and yellow caution stripes. The space is narrow and enclosed with large support columns, transitioning from the covered plaza to an open area ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with holographic advertising pillars and central tree

events.description: exits covered underpass into open plaza with two large cylindrical holographic advertisements
crowd density increases significantly while approaching the central tree area

agents.ego_description: walking through open plaza between teal and pink holographic pillars toward the central tree

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark coat walking toward camera
group of pedestrians walking in same direction as camera

entered.detail: tall cylindrical pillar wrapped in teal and pink holographic advertisements
tall cylindrical pillar wrapped in pink and yellow holographic advertisements
mature tree with twisted trunk in illuminated rectangular planter
large rectangular digital screen displaying advertisements
trees with pink illuminated blossoms lining the plaza

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide plaza dominated by two massive cylindrical holographic pillars glowing in teal and pink. A large central tree stands in the middle of the plaza surrounded by moderate crowds of pedestrians. Cherry blossom trees with pink lights line the right side, and skyscrapers rise in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: walkway past central tree toward food stall area

events.description: camera turns slightly left to pass around tree and illuminated benches

agents.ego_description: walking past illuminated benches and tree toward food stall area with fewer pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person sitting on illuminated bench under the tree

entered.detail: concrete benches with integrated white lighting underneath
food vendor stall with bright green neon lighting and red lanterns

segments.scene_description: Moving past the central tree area, the camera navigates around illuminated benches where a person sits. The crowd thins out as the scene transitions toward a darker walkway. A food stall with green neon lighting becomes visible in the distance on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered food stall with green neon lighting

events.description: arrives at food stall with hanging red paper lanterns and bright green neon lights

agents.ego_description: approaching food stall counter where vendor is preparing food and customers wait

notable_agents.action: customer standing at food stall counter ordering

entered.detail: traditional Japanese-style red paper lanterns with black text hanging from stall awning
white round stools arranged in front of food counter

segments.scene_description: The final segment arrives at a narrow food stall bathed in green neon light. Red paper lanterns hang from the awning above a counter with white stools. A vendor prepares food behind the counter while a customer waits, and the cherry blossom trees are visible in the background on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit urban center, moving from a sheltered commercial area into a vast holographic plaza and finally toward a secluded food stall. It begins in a semi-covered plaza beside a weapon vendor, where a rotating digital billboard casts light across wet, reflective paving. The camera then passes through a narrow industrial underpass characterized by metal grates and yellow caution stripes before emerging into a wide-open square dominated by massive teal and pink holographic pillars and a central tree. As the camera navigates past illuminated benches and thinning crowds, the bright expanse of the plaza gives way to a darker walkway. The movement finally concludes at a narrow food stall bathed in green neon light, where red paper lanterns hang over a counter and cherry blossom trees linger in the background.
